latin: Discipuli pessimi convivium magnum paraverunt. unus ex eis linteum corporis pro toga induit et clamare coepit: 'toga! toga!' mox omnes idem fecerunt.

glossary.pro: instead of, in place of (+ abl.)

questions.prompt: What did the students use as togas?
What happened after one started chanting?

translation: The worst students prepared a great party. One of them put on a bedsheet as a toga and began to shout: 'Toga! Toga!' Soon everyone did the same.
